Source: bemap-services-v2/search/bemap-geocoding-request.js

/**
 * BeNomad BeMap JavaScript API - GeocodingRequest
 *
 * Typed request object for `bemap.Geocoder.geocode(request)`. Carrying a
 * dedicated class (rather than a free-form `options` object) is the marker
 * the refreshed Geocoder uses to decide between the Promise-based v1.5 path
 * and the legacy callback-based path — see `bemap-geocoder-v2.js`.
 *
 * The class is intentionally tolerant: every field is optional and the
 * server validates the combination. Fluent setters return `this` so the
 * request can be built in one expression.
 *
 * @since 1.5.0
 * @public
 * @constructor
 * @param {Object} [options]
 * @param {String} [options.place]                Free-text input ("100 rue de Rivoli, Paris").
 * @param {bemap.Address} [options.address]       Structured input (alternative to `place`).
 * @param {String} [options.searchType]           One of `bemap.GeocodingSearchType.*`.
 * @param {String} [options.assetType]            One of `bemap.AssetSearchType.*`.
 * @param {String} [options.language]             BCP-47 language code (e.g. 'fr', 'en-US').
 * @param {Number} [options.maxResult=10]
 * @param {bemap.BoundingBox} [options.boundingBox] Restrict the lookup to a bbox.
 * @param {bemap.Coordinate} [options.proximity]    Bias the lookup to results near this point.
 * @param {Boolean} [options.addressDetails=true]   Include the full PostalAddress in results.
 */
bemap.GeocodingRequest = function(options) {
    var opts = options || {};

    this.place = opts.place || null;
    this.address = opts.address || null;
    this.searchType = opts.searchType || null;
    this.assetType = opts.assetType || null;
    this.language = opts.language || null;
    this.maxResult = (typeof opts.maxResult === 'number') ? opts.maxResult : 10;
    this.boundingBox = opts.boundingBox || null;
    this.proximity = opts.proximity || null;
    this.addressDetails = (opts.addressDetails === undefined) ? true : !!opts.addressDetails;
};

bemap.GeocodingRequest.prototype.setPlace = function(v) { this.place = v; return this; };
bemap.GeocodingRequest.prototype.setAddress = function(v) { this.address = v; return this; };
bemap.GeocodingRequest.prototype.setSearchType = function(v) { this.searchType = v; return this; };
bemap.GeocodingRequest.prototype.setAssetType = function(v) { this.assetType = v; return this; };
bemap.GeocodingRequest.prototype.setLanguage = function(v) { this.language = v; return this; };
bemap.GeocodingRequest.prototype.setMaxResult = function(v) { this.maxResult = v; return this; };
bemap.GeocodingRequest.prototype.setBoundingBox = function(v) { this.boundingBox = v; return this; };
bemap.GeocodingRequest.prototype.setProximity = function(v) { this.proximity = v; return this; };
bemap.GeocodingRequest.prototype.setAddressDetails = function(v) { this.addressDetails = !!v; return this; };

/**
 * Serialise the request to the JSON shape posted to the BeMap geocoding
 * endpoint. `null` fields are stripped.
 *
 * @return {Object}
 */
bemap.GeocodingRequest.prototype.toJson = function() {
    var body = {};
    if (this.place) body.place = this.place;
    if (this.address) {
        body.address = (typeof this.address.toJson === 'function')
            ? this.address.toJson() : this.address;
    }
    if (this.searchType) body.searchType = this.searchType;
    if (this.assetType) body.assetType = this.assetType;
    if (this.language) body.language = this.language;
    if (this.maxResult !== null && this.maxResult !== undefined) body.maxResult = this.maxResult;
    body.addressDetails = !!this.addressDetails;
    if (this.boundingBox) {
        body.boundingBox = {
            minLon: this.boundingBox.minLon,
            minLat: this.boundingBox.minLat,
            maxLon: this.boundingBox.maxLon,
            maxLat: this.boundingBox.maxLat
        };
    }
    if (this.proximity) {
        body.proximity = {
            longitude: (typeof this.proximity.getLon === 'function')
                ? this.proximity.getLon() : this.proximity.lon,
            latitude: (typeof this.proximity.getLat === 'function')
                ? this.proximity.getLat() : this.proximity.lat
        };
    }
    return body;
};
